text:
Hey, this is such great news. You worked hard for this, and it paid off exactly the way it should. I know how much this role meant to you, and seeing you land it feels genuinely satisfying from where I'm standing.

You are going to do well there. Not because everything will be easy, but because you are the kind of person who figures things out. You show up, you think carefully, and you care about doing good work. That combination matters more than people realize.

Enjoy this moment before the calendar fills up and the meetings start. You earned the right to feel good about this for a while.

I am rooting for you every step of the way. Let me know when we can celebrate properly.
